author: Vincent Voyer
subject: fix(bundle): switch back to React by default, create a preact build (#1228)
body:
* fix(bundle): switch back to React by default, create a preact build

Create a specific preact build instead of defaulting to preact.

We introduced a breaking change for some users when moving to preact
by default (in #1224).

Since we allow React components as templates and some users might be
doing this on the frontend (without preact), let's create a preact
build for now while we investigate.

* chore(travis): build native node modules the right way

see
https://docs.travis-ci.com/user/languages/javascript-with-nodejs#Node.js-v4-(or-io.js-v3)-compiler-requirements

Why does it triggers now? I removed the travis cache, maybe that's why

* style(lint): fix some linting issues
